message: My order #4471 arrived with a cracked screen. What can you do?
gold: I'm sorry your order #4471 arrived damaged. I've started a free replacement that ships today and will email you the tracking number within the hour.

message: I was charged twice for my subscription this month.
gold: Apologies for the double charge. I've refunded the duplicate payment; it should appear on your statement in 3-5 business days, and I've added a note to prevent it recurring.

message: How do I reset my password? I'm locked out.
gold: Let's get you back in. Use the 'Forgot password' link on the sign-in page; you'll receive a reset email within a few minutes. If it doesn't arrive, check spam or reply here and I'll send a manual reset.

message: Your app keeps crashing when I open the camera tab.
gold: Sorry for the trouble. Please update to the latest app version, then restart the app; that resolves most camera-tab crashes. If it persists, tell me your device model and I'll escalate to engineering.

message: I want to cancel my plan before the next billing date.
gold: I can help with that. I've scheduled your plan to cancel at the end of the current billing cycle, so you won't be charged again and keep access until then. You'll get a confirmation email shortly.
